$comment: Serializable catalog of visual templates. Mirrors TemplateRegistry.catalog() in apps/p5-runtime. The bridge + ml-service read this to reason about scenes without importing p5. Keep in sync with src/templates/*. Phase-4.5 templates carry hardwareTarget + idioms (the monome control idioms they drive) + a gestural dictionary; the 9 windchime families were re-ported FAITHFULLY (full visual core + exact params.ts variant space + gestural dict, control/LED via the idioms). The 5 legacy templates use the global column-fader mapping and declare neither.

templates.name: Minimal Pulse
templates.description: Concentric rings breathing from the center. Low-CPU demo fallback.

templates.name: Topographic Tunnel
templates.description: Infinite forward tunnel of noise-displaced contour rings. Rhythmic, deep.

templates.name: Grid World
templates.description: A field of cells rippling with activation waves + neighbor connections.

templates.name: Parquet Glitch
templates.description: Parquet deformation of rotating tiles, fractured by glitch slices.

templates.name: Torus Field
templates.description: Rotating wireframe tori + spheres in 3D. Sustained, harmonic, evolving.

templates.name: Lichtspiel — Opus III
templates.description: Ruttmann Opus III film instrument: a 3D morphing forward tunnel inside 2D rectilinear forms, weathered by film grain. The grid64/arc2 hero.
templates.sourceLineage: Lichtspiel_v3.pde (faithful WEBGL re-port of the P3D original)

templates.name: Arc + Grid Combo
templates.description: 16-step grid sequencer flashing scanlines under the play-head while four arc-driven 3D objects spin. The Grid 128 / Arc 4 step-sequencer idiom showcase.

templates.name: Pattern Grid World
templates.description: A 3D cube field painted cell-by-cell, flickering and wired with connection lines, ringed by an optional pulsing border. The varibright vs monobright showcase.

templates.name: PAS Arc + Grid
templates.description: Four independent 3D objects (icosahedron/sphere/torus/helix/möbius) tumbling on X/Y/Z; grid faders set each object's rotation frequency, arc encoders scale + regenerate them.

templates.name: UPF AV — Topographic Planes + Tunnel
templates.description: Four noise-displaced topographic plane meshes (swirl/disc/ridge/ripple) drifting through a forward noise-tunnel; grid faders sculpt the meshes, arc encoders scale + regenerate the planes.

templates.name: Playhead Shapes + Strobe Overlays
templates.description: Orbiting 3D tori/spheres with self-walking playheads under animated 2D strobe motifs (diagonal/spiral/hex/oval); grid faders set per-motif opacity/gap/random/origin, arc encoders drive movement/speed/size.

templates.name: Ito Box — Cube Roulette
templates.description: A velocity-driven roulette cube with per-face colour pairs over a drifting field of low-poly objects (tori/point-sphere/filament cloud); arc encoders are damped angular-velocity knobs, grid faders shape the background.

templates.name: Parquet Deformation
templates.description: Two stacked deforming Perlin meshes + a cluster of rotating polyhedra; a step sequencer retriggers column-block deformation params, arc encoders drive camera zoom/tilt/overlay.

templates.name: PAS Halloween
templates.description: A 2D step-driven element spawner: firing steps set a column parameter (thickness/rate/size/length) and birth drifting circle/triangle/square/star shapes over a fading trail backdrop; arc encoders set trail/hue/lifespan/jitter.
